entries.source: "Design a plant growth experiment"
entries.value: "Design et eksperiment om plantevækst"

entries.source: "Explain acids and bases"
entries.value: "Forklar syrer og baser"

entries.source: "What happens if we change temperature?"
entries.value: "Hvad sker der, hvis vi ændrer temperaturen?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Science Lab Partner on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk guide til at bruge Laboratoriemakker i naturfag på inspir til STEM læring, med prompter, studieloops og sikrere AI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En stærkere studieloop

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Anpasse sessionen efter dit mål.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-vejleder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om et lille første trin i stilet for et endeligt svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Be AI’en kontroller dit ræsonnement, ikke bara resultatet.

entries.source: Explore experiments and concepts safely.
entries.value: Udforsk eksperimenter og begrepp sikkert.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Afslut gennem at skrive tilbage idéen fra hukommelsen.

entries.source: Learners exploring stem topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Elever, der udforsker STEM-emner og ønsker praktisk vejledning frem for en generisk svarkasse.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter at prøve

entries.source: Science Lab Partner
entries.value: Science Lab Partner

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Laboratoriemakker i naturfag AI-læringstilstand er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Planlæg sikre demonstrationer, førstå variabler, forudsig resultater, og ræsonnér ud fra evidens som en forsker.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Laboratoriemakker i naturfag AI-læringstilstand: praktisk guide

entries.source: Start the live mode at Science Lab Partner. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Writing Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-tilstanden ved Laboratoriemakker i naturfag. Hvis du vil have et nærliggende læringsformat, kan du prøve Skrivecoach. For et bredere blik på platformen kan du læse, hvad en AI-læringsmakker bør gøre for alle.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Start med eksempel prompter.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell tilstand hvad du er prøver at lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste sessioner gat gennem en loop: set en matl, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svag spot, og velg næste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matematikmatikrs. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringstilstand gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinAIng, øvelse, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjælper idé stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med AI uden cheating dig selv: hold elev active. AI er most nyttig natr det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinAIng.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne tilstanden er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for science lab partner with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Denne tilstand er finjusteret til en videnskabelig laboratoriepartner med egne prompts, eksempler og læringsforløb.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv trinet med egne ord.

entries.source: Use Science Lab Partner when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Brug Laboratoriemakker i naturfag, når du vil have en session, der starter hurtigt, men stadig tilpasser sig dig. Det første mål er ikke at lyde imponerende. Det første mål er at få næste skridt til at føles muligt.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hvad denne tilstanden hjælper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du gatr videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. session kan clarify nivat, matlgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
